overview: Cinevora is a premium OTT streaming platform with a dark luxury black-and-gold UI. It features a Netflix-style home page with hero banners and content carousels, Internet Identity authentication, a full-featured custom video player, free/premium content gating, subscription plans, a user profile with watch history and My List, real-time search, and a hidden admin panel for content management.
features: Home page with auto-sliding hero banner and content carousels (Trending, Top Rated, Free, Premium)
Internet Identity authentication with user profile stored in backend
Custom video player with play/pause, seek, volume, fullscreen, and progress tracking
Free vs Premium content gating with subscription upgrade prompts
Payment page with UPI/Card/Wallet UI structure (Razorpay-ready)
Profile page with subscription badge, My List, and Watch History
Real-time search filtering by title and category
Hidden admin panel at /admin for movie upload with Cloudinary-ready structure
6 pre-seeded demo movies (3 free, 3 premium) with full metadata
Black + gold glassmorphism design with glow hover effects and smooth animations
Mobile-first responsive layout with touch-friendly controls
